word.name: JSON Schema for the concept of class threads
word.title: JSON Schema for the Concept of Class Threads
word.description: This is the JSON Schema for elements of the concept of class threads. Every element of this concept must validate against this JSON schema.

jsonSchema.name: class thread
jsonSchema.title: Class Thread
jsonSchema.description: JSON Schema for elements of the concept of class threads

conceptSlug.name: conceptSlug
conceptSlug.title: Concept Slug
conceptSlug.description: The slug of the concept this class thread belongs to

conceptUuid.name: conceptUuid
conceptUuid.title: Concept UUID
conceptUuid.description: The uuid of the ConceptHeader node that initiates this class thread

supersetUuid.name: supersetUuid
supersetUuid.title: Superset UUID
supersetUuid.description: The uuid of the Superset node that is the root of this class thread

depth.name: depth
depth.title: Depth
depth.description: Number of IS_A_SUPERSET_OF hops in the propagation phase (0 = no sub-supersets)
